gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Before the career fair opens, students line up outside the university gym.
Inside, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

A welcome announcement over the PA system outlines the fair schedule while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Before the career fair opens, students line up outside the university gym.

Inside, a welcome announcement over the PA system outlines the fair schedule as dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students clutch resumes inside branded folders; and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
